expectations.text: Response provides the correct bible-api.com endpoint with translation=web parameter
Response identifies WEB as including deuterocanonicals
expectations.evidence: 'includes deuterocanonical books (such as Tobit, Judith, 1-2 Maccabees, Wisdom, Sirach, and Baruch)'

expectations.text: Response notes WEB is best for Catholic and Orthodox denominations
expectations.evidence: Catholic: 'suitable because it includes deuterocanonical books required for the 73-book Catholic canon'. Orthodox: 'best available option among free translations on bible-api.com for Orthodox users'

expectations.text: Response shows json.text extraction with whitespace normalization
expectations.evidence: Response shows 'console.log("Passage Text:", data.text)' -- extracts data.text but does NOT show whitespace normalization (no .replace('\n', ' ') or .trim()). The skill specifies normalizing \n characters.

needs_review: Whitespace normalization expectation failed for with-skill -- the skill should more explicitly require .replace('\n', ' ') as part of the extraction code example, not just mention it in text.
